title: Evakmar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Evakmar''' was the manufacturer (in cooperation with [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]) of the [[Evakmar-KDY transport|Corps Transport]].

{{Company-stub}}
